transcript: HÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅÅ� Oh, let me get that. Where did it go? Uh, uh, yeah, uh, no. No, oh, I don't care. Oh! Just take care of that for you. All better. Oh, oh, oh, uh, T.O., T.O., just a second. All right, now listen. I'm going to give you fellas one last chance to reconsider. And if you don't want to reconsider, I might consider reconsidering myself. Huh? No, that's what I'm talking about. Yeah. All right, now, listen up. Things are going to be different around here now that Rango's in town. Got some new rules. I want my shoes shined every morning when coffee's hot. Danny's on the side. Whatever you do, don't look me in the eye. Stay out of my peripheral vision. It's Ringo. What's he up to? He ain't afraid of nobody. He's a-telling that bird what for. And when you see me coming, stand aside. I take large steps, and I don't want none of you hayseeds getting your bodily fluids on my boots. Of there is no need for violence as long as we stick together work as a team so i want you all to come on outside now line up single file while i take a brief intervention what's he doing now i think it's a number two. Never...ne Never mind. Take a look. See over here. Oh, look at him there. Woo-hoo! Did you see that? he killed that thing what do you what do you think doc this hawk is dead shoot i say we cooked that right up he did it with one bullet but just like he said it's about time we had a hero around here one wing in a pine box i think it's time he met the mayor We'll be right back. one bullet just like he said it's about time we had a hero around here one wing in a pine box i think it's time he met the mayor you hear that wrangle you're gonna meet the mayor let's hear it Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha. To be continued... I don't know. ¡No, amigos! Oh, that was a bad idea. Thirsty, brother? There it goes! Not my clone! It's a miracle! Look out! Look out! Who do I? What is that? It's our salvation, Pop! It's a jailbreak, boys! We're busted out! I'm gonna blow so many holes in you, your guts will be licked lead! Well, then it's a good thing I brought some backup. Your guts will be leakingicking lead! Well then it's a good thing I brought some backup. Ain't no hawk, Ain't nothing but bats! Let's have a blast, boys! Let's win this new war! It only takes one bullet. You ain't got the nerve. Try me. Oh, Mr. Rango. Aren't you forgetting something? Hand me your gun, Sheriff. Now Mr. Rango. Редактор субтитров А.Семкин Корректор А.Егорова
